title: UltraCraft modpack
description: This modpack created for comfortable playing with ultracraft mod
body:
# ULTRACRAFT modpack ```Stable``` ```1.20.1``` ```Fabric only``` - Based on [Neon](https://modrinth.com/modpack/neon-modpack) ## About This modpack created for comfortable playing with ultracraft mod ## Community We are an open community, always ready to help. We have our own discord server with a forum, a github page where you can leave noticed bugs or your suggestions. ## Steam deck and controllers compatibility - Using [Controlify](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlify) - Controlify comes with a huge range of settings to fine-tune each of your controllers individually, including vibration strength, every single controller input bind (no hardcoding!) and more. ## Performance We recommend allocate minimum 5GB of ram for singleplayer game and 3GB for playing on server. And dual core cpu is strongly recommended. ## Video [![video](http://img.youtube.com/vi/jpuiTifUs0Y/0.jpg)](http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jpuiTifUs0Y) ```This modpack works on fabric!``` https://fabricmc.net/

``` Tip: install our icon to install in the launcher (icon.png) Tip: use Aikar´s launch options, they will help you to be more efficient :) Tip: use the latest version of fabric Tip: this modpack will be work better if you using Linux. But MacOS/Windows still compatible Also: We prefer the Foss mods. ``` #### Other mods - [Make Bubbles Pop](https://modrinth.com/mod/make_bubbles_pop)
